description: Defines display settings common to all repository resource types. Can be used alongside resource-specific styling schemas.

transparency.description: Transparency in the range [0.0, 1.0] where 0 is fully opaque and 1 is fully transparent.

selectionEnabled.description: If true, selection is enabled for this resource, making it eligible to be included in selection results or used by selection-driven tools. If false, the resource remains visible but is not selectable.
